infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tracker uses the camera to detect objects you tap and pin animated faces onto them.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Tracker uses the microphone so you can talk back to the objects.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Tracker transcribes what you say so the object can reply.

plugins.cameraPermissionText: Tracker uses the camera to detect objects you tap.
plugins.microphonePermissionText: Tracker uses the microphone so you can talk back.

plugins.microphonePermission: Tracker needs the microphone to hear what you say.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Tracker transcribes speech so objects can reply.
